name: Is AI sanction risk higher in NY federal courts vs state?
description: Higher in NY federal; stricter Rule 11 enforcement.[1]

mainEntity.name: Is AI sanction risk higher in NY federal courts vs state?

acceptedAnswer.text: Higher in NY federal; stricter Rule 11 enforcement.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, federal courts like SDNY aggressively sanction AI misuse per Levidow and Heppner. State courts follow but federal sets precedents.[1][2] Key factors: FRCP 11 strictness, judge discretion. Federal demands higher verification. Tailor practices by venue.
